title: Tool Kit | Staunch 200 Piece Home and Office Tool Set | Complete Starter Tool Kit Set & Organiser Tool Box with Tools Included | General Household Tool Kits for Home with DIY Tools in Tool Case
features: Complete Toolset - This compact tool kit contains motorcycle tool kit accessories and equipment including wrenches, household screwdriver and hammer set.

Portable Tool Box Organiser - The hard shell tool bag with fasteners will organise every utensil so they are easy to locate in the mechanic box. The plastic material makes it a lightweight tool bag so it is easy to hold.

Multi Tool Kit Set for everyone - Tools for men & Tools for women. There are a wide range of tools included in the STAUNCH beginners tool kit. The professional hand tools make up an excellent tools gift set.

Starter tool kit - This 200 piece tool kit is perfect when you’re looking for Christmas gifts. When you’re in search of their first tool kit or a father’s day gift the Staunch tool set is the perfect small tool kits for home renovations.

Quality, Support & Guarantee - Every tool is manufactured with brushed chrome for anti-corrosion. With normal use the tools are forged to last a lifetime. We are real people, send us a message if you ever need any aftercare support.
description: Product Description The Complete Toolkit Our hard shell case contains really useful tools for a range of tasks. It's time to Launch your new DIY career with STAUNCH. We complied all the best tool kits into one easy to use solution. The perfect Christmas gift for the enthusiastic home improver . From hanging those beloved photo frames to assembling that new king size bed. They said it would be easy - Our household set will give you the tools you need to smash it DO IT YOURSELF 6x combination wrench 1x magnetic rod 2x screwdriver 6x38 1x claw hammer 2x screwdriver 5x100 1x 8’’ adjustable wrench 1x insulation tape 1x 6’’ long nose pliers 1x ¼ ratchet bit holder 1x 6’’ combination pliers 1x ¼ extension bar 2’’ 1x wire stripping pliers 12x ¼ metric socket 1x 8’’ water pump pliers 5x precision screwdriver 1x cutter 1x electric test pen 10x knife blades 1x spirit level 9x hex key wrench 1x ⅜ ratchet wrench 10x plastic tie 10x ⅜ metric socket 1x handsaw 1x 16mm spark plug 2x spare saw blade 1x 3m tape measure 73x fastener parts 1x transfer socket 40x screw bits 25x30mm, 50x10mm 1x ⅜ extension bar 3’’ Hard shell case with locking clips
